race.description: Hip Pocket Batemans Bay Mdn Hcp
race.comment: GLENN'S LEGACY (5) finally drawn a decent gate third-up and can put these away at his seventh race start. Covered plenty of ground to sit on the pace before tiring in the straight to run seventh over 1200m at Warren. This looks a nice race from the inside marble. PARIAH TIME (2) lightly raced Pariah gelding resuming. Showed potential in his two runs at this course last prep and fitted with a trial placing over 800m at Kembla Grange. Has options from the gate and stays in the mix. YES ARNIE (10) comes here deep into the campaign and drops in trip from a sticky gate. Will find this more to his liking and can take a hand in the finish. SPRING BLOSSOM (9) three-year-old filly by Flying Artie from First Blossom on debut for the Karakatsanis yard. Trials have been ordinary but can lift under race conditions.
